location: Dropped by the Putrid Avatar, a boss-tier enemy patrolling a bridge east of the Prayer Room Site of Grace in Elphael, Brace of the Haligtree.
tactics: The Avatar is escorted by Haligtree Knights, turning this into a group fight — try to pull enemies apart if possible
Ballistas mounted on a ledge to the north can snipe you while you cross the bridge — use cover or push through quickly
Don't confuse it with the non-rotted Erdtree Avatar in Deeproot Depths, which drops the similar-looking Staff of the Avatar instead
lore: A ceremonial staff shaped in the image of the Erdtree's former radiance, now rotted through with Scarlet Rot; once carried by the avatar-guardians who watched over the Minor Erdtrees.

builds.name: Strength melee stat-stick
builds.why: C-scaling Strength with no Faith requirement lets a pure-Strength character use it as a heavy melee weapon with built-in rot buildup, without investing in a casting stat.
